title: Elmer’s Crunchy Slime Activator | Washable & Kid-Friendly Magical Liquid Glue | 98 g Bottle
features: Make crunchy slime that crackles in 3 simple steps with this easy-to-use slime activator
All-in-one formula replaces contact lens solution, bicarbonate of soda and crunchy additives
Simply add to most Elmer’s glue to make satisfyingly crunchy slime
Washable with soap and water for quick and easy clean-ups
description: From the manufacturer Elmer's Magical Liquid Crunchy Slime Activator Discover the magic of slime with Elmer’s Magical Liquid Crunchy Slime Activator, an all-in-one formula that makes satisfyingly crunchy slime when added to most Elmer's glue! It’s child-friendly* and washable with soap and water, so it’s easy to clean up and great for kids. Make slime with a pleasing crunchy texture, without the need for bicarbonate of soda, contact lens solution and other additives. Check out how to make crunchy slime below! *Not suitable for children under 3 years. At a Glance… All-in-one formula replaces contact lens solution, bicarbonate of soda and additives Simply add to most Elmer’s glue to make satisfyingly crunchy slime Washable and child-friendly Recipe: Elmer's Metallic Crunchy Slime Ingredients: 1 x Elmer's Metallic Glue bottle (147 ml) 4 x tbsp Elmer's Crunchy Magical Liquid (68 ml) Recipe: Elmer's Metallic Crunchy Slime Start with Glue Pour 1 whole bottle of Elmer's Metallic Glue into a bowl Recipe: Elmer's Metallic Crunchy Slime Add Elmer's Magical Liquid & Stir Add 2 tbsp of Crunchy Magical Liquid and mix slowly until slime begins to form, gradually adding another 2 tbsp Recipe: Elmer's Metallic Crunchy Slime Remove & Knead Take slime out of bowl and begin kneading with both hands Adult supervision required. Project not appropriate for children under the age of 3 years. Thoroughly wash hands before and after making and playing with slime. Ingredients Step 1 Step 2 Step 3 All-in-One Formula Make satisfyingly crunchy glue slime, without the need for bicarbonate of soda, contact lens solution or additives. Simply add the Magical Liquid to most Elmer's glue for slime with a pleasing crunchy texture. Washable for Easy Clean Up Created with parents and teachers in mind, Elmer's Magical Liquid is child-friendly and washable for easy clean-up. It's the less messy, stress-free way to add excitement to slime projects. Try Them All Make all kinds of slime with Elmer's Magical Liquid. Add a metal sheen with the Metallic Slime Activator, or sparkling colour with the Confetti Slime Activator. Each will take your slime creations to the next level!
